speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome! Feast your eyes on this gem – a one-owner 2019 Toyota RAV4 XLE. It's practically new with only 52,000 miles and loaded with features like Toyota Safety Sense and a big touchscreen. These RAV4s are legendary for reliability, and this one's been meticulously maintained. Ready for any adventure you can throw at it!

Toyota's reputation for reliability isn't just hype, you know, especially with these well-maintained models.
